# Install Initial Setup
Download and run the bootstrap prompt from this raw URL.

Raw URL: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jeff-hamm/copilot-instructions/main/dist/initial-setup.readonly.prompt.md`
Temp file: `<TEMP_DIR>/copilot-instructions/initial-setup.readonly.prompt.md`

1. Create `<TEMP_DIR>/copilot-instructions` if it does not exist.
2. Download `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jeff-hamm/copilot-instructions/main/dist/initial-setup.readonly.prompt.md` to `<TEMP_DIR>/copilot-instructions/initial-setup.readonly.prompt.md`.
3. Confirm the downloaded file starts with `# Initial Copilot Setup`.
4. Run `<TEMP_DIR>/copilot-instructions/initial-setup.readonly.prompt.md` as a prompt.
